_kno_commands() {
    local -a commands
    commands=(
'claim:Claim a knot and get its action prompt.' \
'cold:Cold-tier operations.' \
'compact:Run compaction operations.' \
'completions:Generate or install shell completions.' \
'doctor:Run repository health diagnostics.' \
'edge:Manage knot edges.' \
'fsck:Validate on-disk knots event/index data.' \
'gate:Manage gate decisions and metadata.' \
'help:Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)' \
'hooks:Manage git sync hooks (post-merge).' \
'init:Initialize local store and remote or named project state.' \
'init-remote:Create remote knots branch and ensure .knots is gitignored.' \
'lease:Manage lease sessions.' \
'loom:Manage Loom compatibility checks.' \
'ls:List knots with filtering and layout.' \
'new:Create a new knot.' \
'next:Advance a knot to its next happy-path state.' \
'perf:Run performance harness checks.' \
'poll:Peek at the highest-priority claimable knot.' \
'profile:Inspect and manage workflow profiles.' \
'project:Manage named Knots projects.' \
'pull:Pull knot updates from the remote knots branch.' \
'push:Push local knot updates to the remote knots branch.' \
'q:Quick-create a knot using the default quick profile.' \
'ready:List knots queued for action (ready_for_* states).' \
'rehydrate:Rehydrate one knot from warm/cold/event data.' \
'rollback:Roll back a knot from an action state to its prior ready state.' \
'show:Show one knot by id or alias.' \
'skill:Print the skill prompt for a knot'\''s next action state.' \
'skills:Manage Knots-managed agent skills.' \
'state:Set a knot state with transition validation.' \
'step:Manage step execution history.' \
'sync:Push then pull knot updates.' \
'uninit:Remove local knots store artifacts and delete remote branch.' \
'uninstall:Uninstall kno from the system.' \
'update:Update knot fields and metadata in one command.' \
'upgrade:Self-update the kno binary.' \
'workflow:Manage installed workflows.' \
    )
    _describe -t commands 'kno commands' commands "$@"
}
(( $+functions[_kno__claim_commands] )) ||
_kno__claim_commands() {
    local commands; commands=()
    _describe -t commands 'kno claim commands' commands "$@"
}

autoload -U is-at-least

_kno() {
    typeset -A opt_args
    typeset -a _arguments_options
    local ret=1

    if is-at-least 5.2; then
        _arguments_options=(-s -S -C)
    else
        _arguments_options=(-s -C)
    fi

    local context curcontext="$curcontext" state line
    _arguments "${_arguments_options[@]}" : \
'-d+[Path to the local SQLite cache database.]:DB:_default' \
'--db=[Path to the local SQLite cache database.]:DB:_default' \
'-C+[Repository root to target for this command.]:REPO_ROOT:_files' \
'--repo-root=[Repository root to target for this command.]:REPO_ROOT:_files' \
'--project=[Named Knots project to target for this command.]:PROJECT:_default' \
'--trace[Emit per-command trace timings to stderr.]' \
'-h[Print help]' \
'--help[Print help]' \
'-V[Print version]' \
'--version[Print version]' \
":: :_kno_commands" \
"*::: :->kno" \
&& ret=0
    case $state in
    (kno)
        words=($line[1] "${words[@]}")
        (( CURRENT += 1 ))
        curcontext="${curcontext%:*:*}:kno-command-$line[1]:"
        case $line[1] in
            (new)
_arguments "${_arguments_options[@]}" : \
'-d+[Optional description text.]:DESC:_default' \
'--desc=[Optional description text.]:DESC:_default' \
'--acceptance=[Optional acceptance criteria.]:ACCEPTANCE:_default' \
'-s+[Initial knot state (defaults to profile initial_state).]:STATE:_default' \
'--state=[Initial knot state (defaults to profile initial_state).]:STATE:_default' \
'-p+[Profile id (defaults to the user default profile).]:PROFILE:_default' \
'--profile=[Profile id (defaults to the user default profile).]:PROFILE:_default' \
'-w+[Workflow id (defaults to the repo default workflow).]:WORKFLOW:_default' \
'--workflow=[Workflow id (defaults to the repo default workflow).]:WORKFLOW:_default' \
'-k+[Knot type (work or gate).]:KNOT_TYPE:_default' \
'--type=[Knot type (work or gate).]:KNOT_TYPE:_default' \
'--gate-owner-kind=[Gate owner kind\: human or agent.]:GATE_OWNER_KIND:_default' \
'*--gate-failure-mode=[Gate failure mapping '\''<invariant>=<knot-id\[,knot-id...\]>'\'' (repeatable).]:GATE_FAILURE_MODES:_default' \
'--lease=[Bind a lease to this knot.]:LEASE:_default' \
'-f[Use the default quick profile (skips planning).]' \
'--fast[Use the default quick profile (skips planning).]' \
'--trace[Emit per-command trace timings to stderr.]' \
'-h[Print help]' \
'--help[Print help]' \
':title -- Knot title.:_default' \
&& ret=0
;;
(state)
_arguments "${_arguments_options[@]}" : \
'-m+[Require this profile etag to match before writing.]:IF_MATCH:_default' \
'--if-match=[Require this profile etag to match before writing.]:IF_MATCH:_default' \
'--actor-kind=[Actor kind for the step\: human or agent.]:ACTOR_KIND:_default' \
'--agent-name=[Agent name for step metadata.]:AGENT_NAME:_default' \
'--agent-model=[Agent model for step metadata.]:AGENT_MODEL:_default' \
'--agent-version=[Agent version for step metadata.]:AGENT_VERSION:_default' \
'-f[Force an otherwise invalid transition.]' \
'--force[Force an otherwise invalid transition.]' \
'--cascade-terminal-descendants[Approve cascading a terminal state to all descendants.]' \
'--trace[Emit per-command trace timings to stderr.]' \
'-h[Print help]' \
'--help[Print help]' \
':id -- Knot full id, stripped id, or hierarchical alias.:_default' \
':state -- Target state.:_default' \
&& ret=0
;;

_kno_commands() {
    local -a commands
    commands=(
'claim:Claim a knot and get its action prompt.' \
'cold:Cold-tier operations.' \
'compact:Run compaction operations.' \
'completions:Generate or install shell completions.' \
'doctor:Run repository health diagnostics.' \
'edge:Manage knot edges.' \
'fsck:Validate on-disk knots event/index data.' \
'gate:Manage gate decisions and metadata.' \
'help:Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)' \
'hooks:Manage git sync hooks (post-merge).' \
'init:Initialize local store and remote or named project state.' \
'init-remote:Create remote knots branch and ensure .knots is gitignored.' \
'lease:Manage lease sessions.' \
'loom:Manage Loom compatibility checks.' \
'ls:List knots with filtering and layout.' \
'new:Create a new knot.' \
'next:Advance a knot to its next happy-path state.' \
'perf:Run performance harness checks.' \
'poll:Peek at the highest-priority claimable knot.' \
'profile:Inspect and manage workflow profiles.' \
'project:Manage named Knots projects.' \
'pull:Pull knot updates from the remote knots branch.' \
